raw_consumer_statement:
I had trouble with a purchase from XXXX, where they would not accept a return for a defective tire I purchased. Because of this I had to go buy a new tire and am out the cost of a new tire and have a broken on that I cant use. 

I started a dispute with Citi, and they reached out to the retailer and waited for their response. They received a response a week ago. They told me today that they read the response and that I am responsible for these charges 100 %. They never sent me the response, and they never gave me a chance to defend myself ; they just side with the retailer 100 %. 

I feel I have a good case for this dispute and need a chance to defend myself. 

The retailer is etrailer.com and was purchased with a Citi XXXX credit card on XX/XX/year>. {$300.00} order number XXXX Contacted XXXX  on XX/XX/XXXX and told them they sent me a bad tire, and they said sorry, too bad you need to contact the manufacturer, we can't do anything. 

The requested dispute was sent on XX/XX/XXXX, and they contacted XXXX on XX/XX/XXXX. 

XXXX responded on XX/XX/XXXX, and on XX/XX/XXXX, Citi said I had to pay, with no way for me to answer or come back with details to defend myself and no notes of what XXXX said. 

XXXX ID with Citi XXXX
